title: Pending withdraw requests not cleared on failed finalization
reason: `finalized == false` intentionally represents asynchronous pending state; this is expected behavior, not a distinct vulnerability.

title: Division by zero in LP oracle when pool supply is zero
reason: Edge case is not realistically exploitable for protocol harm in active positions; when LP total supply is zero there is no collateralized LP exposure to value.

title: Reward debt advances even when transfer fails silently
Pending withdraw valuation uses yield token price before finalization
reason: Overbroad generic claim; confirmed reportable case is manager-specific and captured as F-021 (Ethena cooldown).

title: No vault-lending router association validation in setPosition
reason: By design, any whitelisted lending router may open positions on whitelisted vaults; no unauthorized vault write primitive is introduced beyond router whitelist trust.

title: Permissionless manual finalization allows early ERC4626 conversion
Health factor uses account-agnostic vault price oracle
reason: Inaccurate as stated: `healthFactor` calls `price(borrower)` with borrower context. Broader oracle-path concern is already tracked in F-002.

title: setCurrentAccount modifier lacks reentrancy protection
reason: Speculative; no concrete reentrant exploit path shown through router-gated call graph.

title: Pendle PT slippage validation only applied to DEX trades
reason: Incorrect: direct redemption path checks `minPurchaseAmount` at `staking/PendlePT.sol:122`.

title: AbstractSingleSidedLP pool share check compares against total supply
reason: Intended design check to cap protocol share of pool supply; no concrete bypass or harm demonstrated.

title: Ethena cooldown holder allows duplicate cooldown initiation
reason: Claim is unsupported; each request uses a fresh cloned holder and cooldown state is per-holder.

title: Origin withdrawal request lacks validation for zero amount
reason: Low-value input hygiene and largely subsumed by existing dust/zero-yield withdraw edge case in F-005.

title: RewardManagerMixin allows non-router to claim for any account
reason: No value diversion: rewards are transferred to the target account, not caller; front-running alone does not create protocol-level loss.

title: TimelockUpgradeableProxy upgrade state not cleared after execution
Dinero batch nonce uses unbounded increment
